stemHtml:
When water droplets are present at an OAT of lower than 0°C, which of the following are required for the water droplets to transition to freeze?

1. Presence of water vapour in the air
2. Supercooled water droplets
3. Release of latent heat
4. Absorption of latent heat
5. Presence of suitable condensation nuclei
6. Seed crystals
